famous quote:
"If we let ourselves, we shall always be waiting for some distraction or other to end before we can really get down to our work. The only people who achieve much are those who want knowledge so badly that they seek it while the conditions are still unfavorable. Favorable conditions never come."
-- C.S. Lewis
User added:
"Those who sow their tears as seeds will reap a harvest with joyful shouts of glee. They may weep as they go out carrying their seed to sow, but they will return with joyful laughter and shouting with gladness as they bring back armloads of blessing and a harvest overflowing!"
‭‭Psalms‬ ‭126:5-6 TPT‬‬‬‬‬

As sure as God is in heaven, trials and tragedy will find each and every one of us. In the midst of suffering, it is hard to see meaning, let alone joy that might come from our pain. It is okay to cry, and to cry out to God when things don't make sense. God knows our suffering in Christ Jesus. He has counted every tear before it fell, and He can make every tear count. Lean into Him, as you walk through the hard times. Don't be afraid. He is big enough to handle your conflicting emotions. There is joy on the other side. That is a promise-not mine, His.

"I had only heard about you before, but now I have seen you with my own eyes."
‭‭Job‬ ‭42:5‬ ‭NLT‬‬‬‬‬‬

-Sean Lennon
Interview Text:
Bill:

(part 5)

Bill's brother came to Christ and said, Bill you have it but I can't hear God's voice. He read the scriptures and saw that it said, just ask. So he asked for his job back, etc.  "So where is your God, Bill." Bill says, if you read on, you'll see that if you haven't forgiven people, it can block the hearing.
 
Ross, trust God to know what to list in this book. 

He's looking for "true fathers" who listen to God to call forth sons and daughters. We'll see a transformation in culture to call out the orphans. They will say, I recognize that voice! it's in me.

There was a woman who came in to get prophesy. I said a few words about what I saw in her childhood and she cried. I had asked for that from God, "Tell me something to connect her to God." If I know their childhood this can help people feel connected and trust, because they feel like God knows WHO THEY ARE at their core!

The power of relationship, sonship and daughtership is huge.
Music Video Instructions: Imagine the kingdom happening behind the material one.
